contents:
# US Navy Destroyer USS Ralph Johnson arrives Subic Bay for Balikatan replenishment

## Overview
The USS Ralph Johnson (DDG 114) docked at Subic Bay for logistics support during Exercise Balikatan 2026. Philippine Navy hosted the port call with joint fueling operations. No incidents reported during arrival.

## Details
Arleigh Burke-class destroyer carried out routine port visit amid ongoing multinational drills involving 16,000 troops. Philippine Armed Forces welcomed crew for cultural exchange. Fueling completed by April 29 using PN tugs. US 7th Fleet spokesperson noted "strengthening interoperability." Balikatan runs through May 10. Local Olongapo officials coordinated security.

**Location**: Olongapo, Philippines

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @olongapotimes, which covers Olongapo Subic Bay US Navy Philippines port calls Balikatan. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following Olongapo Subic Bay US Navy Philippines port calls Balikatan will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
